message:
fix(btree,mvcc): migrate balance to PageData API and fix concurrent handle borrows

btree/balance.rs:
- Replace write_page(&[u8]) calls with write_page_data(PageData)
  using PageData::from_vec() in balance_quick, insert_cell_into_page,
  apply_child_replacement, and split_overflowing_nonroot_interior_page,
  avoiding redundant copies on the hot page-write path

mvcc/begin_concurrent.rs:
- Fix borrow checker violations in test code: use `&mut handle` for
  mutating operations (write_page, free_page, rollback_to_savepoint,
  commit, abort, track_write_conflict_page, restore_page_state) and
  `&handle` for read-only operations (read_page, page_is_freed,
  page_state, savepoint, validate_first_committer_wins)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
